channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Vintage Photos Highlight the Evolution of Young Women’s Fashion During the 1960s
item.description: The article published by Vintage Everyday explores the changing fashion styles worn by young women throughout the 1960s, a decade widely recognized for its cultural transformation and influence on mod...

item.title: Ouaddou considers leaving Orlando Pirates after title-winning debut season
item.description: Orlando Pirates head coach Abdeslam Ouaddou has suggested that he may step down after a highly successful debut season in charge, despite guiding the club to their first Premiership title in 14 years....

item.title: State of emergency declared in Orange County after chemical tank poses major explosion risk
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom has declared a state of emergency in Orange County following a serious industrial incident involving a large chemical storage tank at a GKN Aerospace facility in Garde...

item.title: Washington Post Publishes Daily Sports TV and Radio Schedule for the D.C. Area
item.description: The Washington Post published an updated schedule of sports television and radio programming available in the Washington, D.C., region. The article serves as a viewing and listening guide for local sp...

item.title: Labor group questions validity of workplace happiness survey amid reported labor issues
item.description: A labor group in the Philippines has raised concerns over the credibility of a recently published workplace happiness survey conducted by an online job search company, saying that it does not reflect ...

item.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator partners with NSW Rural Fire Service to create aerial firefighting mission
item.description: Microsoft Flight Simulator has announced a new collaboration with the NSW Rural Fire Service (RFS), bringing an aerial firefighting mission into the popular flight simulation platform. The partnership...

item.title: CU Rajasthan introduces additional financial support scheme for PhD scholars
item.description: The Central University of Rajasthan (CUoR) has launched a new research promotion scheme aimed at providing additional financial assistance to PhD scholars and encouraging higher quality research outpu...

item.title: New York Knicks move one win away from NBA Finals after defeating Cleveland Cavaliers
item.description: The New York Knicks have moved closer to securing a place in the NBA Finals after defeating the Cleveland Cavaliers, according to a report by Agence France-Presse published on May 24, 2026. The victor...

item.title: KeNHA clears maize crops encroaching Lwanda–Majengo road reserve in Vihiga
item.description: Residents of parts of Vihiga County have expressed strong anger after the Kenya National Highways Authority (KeNHA) carried out an operation to clear maize crops that had been planted along the Lwanda...

item.title: Karl Guilfoyle joins Ord Minnett after departing Bank of America managing director role
item.description: Ord Minnett has strengthened its Sydney institutional sales capability with the appointment of Karl Guilfoyle, a senior markets executive with extensive experience across global investment banks. Guil...

item.title: Ed Sheeran leaves Warner after 15 years amid reported tensions over leadership and restructuring
item.description: Ed Sheeran has ended his 15-year relationship with Warner Music and its Atlantic Records division, prompting widespread discussion within the music industry. In a message to fans, the singer insisted ...

item.title: ANC internal divisions delay submission of MPs for Phala Phala impeachment committee
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) has reportedly failed to meet Parliament’s deadline for submitting the names of Members of Parliament who will serve on the Phala Phala impeachment committee. The d...

item.title: Police invite SDP National Working Committee over internal party leadership dispute
item.description: The Social Democratic Party (SDP) is currently facing a serious internal leadership dispute that has now drawn the attention of the police. According to reports, members of the party’s National Workin...

item.title: Debbie Harry’s 1982 Official Calendar Showcasing Early 1980s Iconic Photo Sessions

item.title: Former Mueller prosecutor questions whether Trump immunity protects him in alleged IRS settlement fund case
item.description: Former federal prosecutor Andrew Weissmann, who previously served as a senior deputy on Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s team, has raised concerns about whether President Donald Trump could face crimi...

item.title: Rescue operations underway after nine-storey building collapses in Angeles City, Philippines
item.description: A nine-storey building under construction collapsed before dawn on Sunday in Angeles City, Pampanga province, north of Manila, during a thunderstorm, prompting a major rescue operation. According to P...

item.title: UK medical tribunal removes Indian-origin oncologist from medical register following criminal conviction
item.description: An Indian-origin cancer specialist working with the National Health Service (NHS) in north-west England has been struck off the United Kingdom’s medical register following a tribunal decision linked t...

item.title: Kiambu Family Demands Justice After Polytechnic Student Dies in Police Custody
item.description: The family of 23-year-old architecture student Brian Njung'e Ndung'u is seeking answers after he was found dead while in custody at Kiambu Police Station shortly after his arrest over alleged burglary...

item.title: Man dies following shark attack near Tully Heads in Far North Queensland
item.description: A 39-year-old man has died after suffering critical injuries in a shark attack in Far North Queensland. The incident occurred near Tully Heads, about 120 kilometres south of Cairns, shortly after midd...

item.title: Telangana reports 16 suspected heatstroke deaths amid severe heatwave; government announces ₹4 lakh compensation
item.description: At least 16 people have died across several districts in Telangana due to suspected heatstroke amid an intense and prolonged heatwave, according to officials. The deaths have been reported from seven ...
